prompt: Surreal oil painting, cinematic lighting. A lone figure stands at the edge of a vast crowd. Every other figure in the crowd is surrounded by many people, connected and clustered. The lone figure looks inward at the crowd. Muted blues and warm ambers. No text, no numbers, no labels, no charts. Photorealistic surrealism.
visual_logic: A solitary figure at the crowd's edge observes that every other person is more surrounded than they are — peripheral perspective made spatially inevitable.
